Package microui.service

Class ValueOverlayManager

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.service.ValueOverlayManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public final class ValueOverlayManager extends View
Manager for value overlay

  • Method Details

    • getBackgroundColor

      public AbstractColor getBackgroundColor()
      Returns the background color of the value overlay.
      Returns:
      the background color.

    • setBackgroundColor

      public Component setBackgroundColor(AbstractColor backgroundColor)
      Sets the background color of the value overlay.
      Parameters:
      backgroundColor - the new background color.
      Returns:
      this component for chaining.

    • getTextColor

      public AbstractColor getTextColor()
      Returns the text color.
      Returns:
      the text color.

    • setTextColor

      public void setTextColor(AbstractColor textColor)
      Sets the text color.
      Parameters:
      textColor - the new text color.

    • getTextSize

      public float getTextSize()
      Returns the text size.
      Returns:
      the text size in pixels.

    • setTextSize

      public void setTextSize(float textSize)
      Sets the text size. If the size differs from the current one, cached text dimensions are updated.
      Parameters:
      textSize - the new text size in pixels.

    • getFont

      public processing.core.PFont getFont()
      Returns the font used for text.
      Returns:
      the current PFont, or null if default.

    • setFont

      public void setFont(processing.core.PFont font)
      Sets the font for text. If the font differs from the current one, cached text dimensions are updated.
      Parameters:
      font - the new PFont.

    • getAutoResizeMode

      public AutoResizeMode getAutoResizeMode()
      Returns the current auto-resize mode.
      Returns:
      the auto-resize mode.

    • isAutoResizeModeEnabled

      public boolean isAutoResizeModeEnabled()
      Checks whether auto-resize mode is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if auto-resize is enabled, false otherwise.

    • setAutoResizeModeEnabled

      public void setAutoResizeModeEnabled(boolean autoResizeModeEnabled)
      Enables or disables auto-resize mode. If the state changes, cached text dimensions are updated.
      Parameters:
      autoResizeModeEnabled - true to enable, false to disable.

    • setAutoResizeMode

      public void setAutoResizeMode(AutoResizeMode autoResizeMode)
      Sets the auto-resize mode. If the mode differs from the current one, cached text dimensions are updated.
      Parameters:
      autoResizeMode - the new auto-resize mode.

    • setSpatialAnimator

      public void setSpatialAnimator(SpatialAnimator spatialAnimator)
      Sets the spatial animator for the underlying text view.
      Parameters:
      spatialAnimator - the animator to use.

    • getSource

      public ValuePreviewSource getSource()
      Returns the current value preview source.
      Returns:
      the source, or null if not set.

    • setSource

      public void setSource(ValuePreviewSource source)
      Sets the value preview source. The source provides the text to display.
      Parameters:
      source - the source, cannot be null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if source is null.

    • getInstance

      public static ValueOverlayManager getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of ValueOverlayManager.
      Returns:
      the instance.
